name: rodix-visual-tokens
phase: Phase 1 (desktop Web primary, mobile responsive); light mode is not Phase 1 scope

background.name: warm-dark
background.usage: page background; intimate / private / late-night-thinking register

text-secondary.usage: metadata, timestamps, helper text, placeholder text

accent-amber.name: amber
accent-amber.usage: verification color — applied consistently to badges, recall callouts, source-card markers, sticky date headers, Card with Promise border. Never decorative.
accent-amber.anti-pattern: Do NOT use Raycast's #ff5e1a — that orange invites copy-cat optics. Amber #d97706 is warmer than Linear's cool indigo (Explorer approachable, not aloof) and more grounded than Anthropic's pure greys.

success.usage: save confirmation; never celebration. Procedural, not festive.

font-family.rationale: Inter is neutral, unspecific, global — matches the cross-model bet (no vendor flavor, no vertical signal). Sans-serif resists 4-field-card sentimentality drift.

hero.usage: landing page hero only; ≤ 12 English words

iconography.decoration-rule: No emoji adornments. Lucide line icons replace emoji. Single exception: ⚡ in active-recall callout.

field-labels-en.hope: What you want / where you're going
field-labels-en.question: What's still unresolved

card-with-promise.null-rendering: Empty fields render as blank — never 'N/A', never invented placeholder. Empty is correct (Decision 5).

chat-bubble-ai.no-bubble: AI replies render bare — no surrounding bubble. Type-first hierarchy.

recall-callout.header-zh-current-placeholder: 记忆提醒 · 话题相关
recall-callout.wave-2-deliverable: Patching header + actions to locked copy is a Wave 2 deliverable on #active-recall-base.

empty-state.tone: One-line hint. Never encouragement walls. Never 'Get started!'

animation.rule: Animations are functional (state transitions), never decorative. No bouncy springs, no celebration confetti.

anti-patterns.notion-3d-glass: Resist Notion-AI's 3D glass effects — incompatible with Explorer anti-spin posture
anti-patterns.granola-handwritten: Resist Granola's handwritten warmth — drifts toward sentimentality
anti-patterns.celebration-toasts: No 🎉 / confetti / 'Great job!' on save events. Procedural feedback only.
anti-patterns.map-iconography: Explorer is a posture toward freedom, not a visual genre. No compass / map / journey iconography.
anti-patterns.emoji-adornment: Single exception is ⚡ in recall callout. No 🚀 / 🎉 / 🔥 / 🎯 / ✨ anywhere else.
anti-patterns.raycast-orange: #ff5e1a invites copy-cat optics. Use #d97706 amber instead.
